Class AddToWaitingListRequest

java.lang.Object
messages.AddToWaitingListRequest
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class AddToWaitingListRequest extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a request to add a user or guest to the restaurant waiting list. Contains information about the user ID (null for guests), contact details, number of guests, and the desired waiting date and time.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    private String
    phone
    The user's phone number.
    private LocalTime
    time
    The time for which the user is waiting.
    private Integer
    userID
    The user ID, null if the request is from a guest.

  • Constructor Details

    • AddToWaitingListRequest

      public AddToWaitingListRequest(Integer userID, String email, String phone, int numOfGuests, LocalDate date, LocalTime time)
      Constructs a new request to add a user or guest to the waiting list.
      Parameters:
      userID - the ID of the user, null if guest
      email - the user's email
      phone - the user's phone
      numOfGuests - number of guests
      date - the date of the reservation
      time - the time of the reservation

  • Method Details

    • getUserID

      public Integer getUserID()
      Returns the user ID, null if a guest.

    • getEmail

      public String getEmail()
      Returns the email of the user.

    • getPhone

      public String getPhone()
      Returns the phone number of the user.

    • getNumOfGuests

      public int getNumOfGuests()
      Returns the number of guests in this request.

    • getDate

      public LocalDate getDate()
      Returns the date for which the user is waiting.

    • getTime

      public LocalTime getTime()
      Returns the time for which the user is waiting.
